facebook.caption:
AI Receptionist for Local Business: What to Automate

Local businesses do not need an AI wall between buyers and the team. They need faster intake, cleaner qualification, and a human handoff for the moments that close work.

Read it: https://eb28.co/blog/ai-receptionist-for-local-business-what-to-automate-and-what-to-keep-human-2026-06/

instagram.caption: AI receptionist for local business: automate intake, confirmations, routing, and reminders. Keep pricing, exceptions, complaints, and trust-heavy sales moments human. Full guide at eb28.co/blog/
instagram.creativeBrief: Carousel: Slide 1 missed-call problem, Slide 2 automate intake and confirmations, Slide 3 keep sensitive moments human, Slide 4 connect website forms to routing, Slide 5 CTA to EB28 project brief.

New EB28 growth brief: AI Receptionist for Local Business: What to Automate

shortFormVideo.hook: Your AI receptionist should not answer everything.
script: Show a missed call and website form arriving after hours.
Cut to four automations: instant confirmation, two qualifying questions, source-page tagging, and owner routing.
Cut to the human lane: pricing, complaints, custom scope, and sensitive customer history.
Close with the guide URL and EB28 project brief CTA.
shortFormVideo.caption: Automate the repeatable receptionist work. Keep the trust-heavy moments human. Guide: eb28.co/blog/
